description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk monument set on a rectangular base, with a prominent five-pointed star structure mounted on top. The base is constructed from large stone blocks, showing signs of age, moss, and discoloration, and features a metal plaque with engraved text on the front. The obelisk's upper section is supported by thin metal rods, which hold two rusted stars, one larger and one smaller, stacked vertically. The monument sits on a patch of uneven ground with visible grass and dirt, and the stonework is rough and stained from exposure to the elements. The rear side of the base has a small, bricked-up opening, suggesting a former compartment or niche. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, typical of memorials found in parks or public squares.
description: A weathered stone obelisk monument with a metal star structure on top, set on a rectangular base with a front plaque and mossy, aged surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main plaque, the large and small metal stars above, and the mossy, stained stone base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated rectangular shape of the base and the vertical alignment of the star structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small, bricked-up opening in the base and the rough, aged stonework.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the mossy surface and the monument's overall rectangular footprint.
attribute_inscription: There is a metal plaque with engraved text on the front face of the base. The text appears to be in a block style, but the language and full legibility are unclear from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk is topped with two five-pointed metal stars, one large and one small, supported by thin rods. These serve as the primary decorative elements.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone block structure with a flat top, weathered surfaces, and a front-facing metal plaque. The rear has a small, bricked-up opening. Moss and discoloration are present, adding to the aged appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features a large five-pointed metal star, rusted and weathered, mounted on thin rods above a smaller star, creating a vertical, symbolic focal point.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of uneven ground with grass and dirt. No other notable features such as platforms, fences, or statues are visible.
